---
title: "survAI"
author: "Leah von der Heyde"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
# Setup

```{r}
# set wd to file location

# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
```

# Import data

```{r}
data <- read_csv("data_survai.csv")
```

# Helper

```{r}
# Helper for counting binaries
prop_count <- function(data, cols, sort_desc = TRUE) {
  data %>%
    select(all_of(cols)) %>%
    summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(. == 1, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%  # count 1s
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "variable",
      values_to = "count"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      proportion = count / nrow(data),
      percent = proportion * 100
    ) %>%
    {if (sort_desc) arrange(., desc(proportion)) else .}
}
```

# Publication years & types

```{r}
100*prop.table(table(data$year))
100*prop.table(table(data$outlet_type))
100*prop.table(table(data$year, data$outlet_type), 1)
100*prop.table(table(data$peer_reviewed))
```

# Figure 2: Phases & tasks

```{r}
# Map tasks to stages
task_stage_map <- tribble(
  ~task,                  ~stage,
  "task_researchdesign",  "Pre-data collection",
  "task_instdev",         "Pre-data collection",
  "task_pretesting",      "Pre-data collection",
  "task_translation",     "Pre-data collection",
  "task_intprep",         "Pre-data collection",
  "task_sampling",        "Pre-data collection",
  "task_interviewing",    "Data collection",
  "task_datageneration",  "Data collection",
  "task_preprocessing",   "Post-data collection",
  "task_dataanalysis",    "Post-data collection",
  "task_classification",  "Post-data collection",
  "task_imputation",      "Post-data collection",
  "task_archiving",       "Post-data collection",
  "task_qualitycontrol",  "Post-data collection"
)

# Tasks in research process order
task_labels <- c(
  "task_researchdesign" = "Research design",
  "task_instdev"        = "Instrument development",
  "task_pretesting"     = "Answering pretest questions",
  "task_translation"    = "Translation",  
  "task_intprep"        = "Interviewer training",
  "task_sampling"       = "Sampling",
  "task_interviewing"   = "Interviewing human respondents",
  "task_datageneration" = "Data generation",
  "task_preprocessing"  = "Pre-processing",
  "task_qualitycontrol" = "Quality control",
  "task_imputation"     = "Imputation",
  "task_classification" = "Classification",
  "task_dataanalysis"   = "Data analysis",
  "task_archiving"      = "Archiving"
)

task_order <- unname(task_labels)

# Calculate shares
data_plot_tasks <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("task_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("task_"),
    names_to = "task",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(value == 1) %>% # keep tasks actually used
  left_join(task_stage_map, by = "task") %>%
  count(stage, task, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    share = n / nrow(data) * 100,
    task = recode(task, !!!task_labels),
    task = factor(task, levels = rev(task_order)),
    stage = factor(stage,
    levels = c("Pre-data collection", "Data collection", "Post-data collection")
                  )
        )

# Plot
plot_tasks <- ggplot(
  data_plot_tasks,
  aes(x = share, y = task, fill = stage)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(share, 1), "%")),
    hjust = -0.1, size = 7.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Share of 136 papers",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Research Phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 24),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 24)
  )

ggsave(plot_tasks, file = "plot_tasks.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_tasks

100*prop.table(table(data$task_datageneration, data$method_silicon), 1)

```
## Number of papers with multiple tasks & phases

```{r}
# Tasks
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    n_tasks = rowSums(select(., starts_with("task_")) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

sum(data$n_tasks > 1)
mean(data$n_tasks > 1)*100

data %>%
  count(n_tasks) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))

# Phases
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    n_phases = rowSums(select(., starts_with("stage_")) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

sum(data$n_phases > 1)
mean(data$n_phases > 1)*100

data %>%
  count(n_phases) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))
```


# Figure 3: LLMs

```{r}
# Calculate shares
data_plot_llms <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("llm_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("llm_"),
    names_to = "llm",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(value == 1, # keep used LLMs
         !llm %in% c("llm_multiple", "llm_bert")
         ) %>%
  mutate(
          # Collapse model derivatives
          llm = case_when(
                llm == "llm_bard"    ~ "llm_gemini",
                llm == "llm_alpaca" ~ "llm_llama",
                TRUE                ~ llm
                ),
          # Keep only main models, collapse rest into Other
          llm = if_else(
                llm %in% c(
                          "llm_gpt",
                          "llm_claude",
                          "llm_llama",
                          "llm_gemini",
                          "llm_mistral",
                          "llm_deepseek"
                          ),
                          llm,
                        "llm_other"
                        ),
          # Clean labels
        llm = llm %>%
        str_remove("^llm_") %>%
        str_to_title(),
        llm = case_when(
                llm == "Gpt" ~ "GPT",
                llm == "Deepseek" ~ "DeepSeek",
                TRUE ~ llm),
        llm_type = if_else(
                            llm %in% c("GPT", "Claude", "Gemini"),
                            "Proprietary",
                            "Open-source"
                          )
  ) %>%
  count(llm, llm_type, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    share = n / nrow(data) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(share)) %>%
  mutate(llm = factor(llm, levels = c("Other", "DeepSeek", "Mistral", "Gemini", "Claude", "Llama", "GPT"))) # descending order with "Other" last

# Plot
plot_llms <- ggplot(
  data_plot_llms,
  aes(x = share, y = llm, fill = llm_type)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(share, 1), "%")),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 7.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "LLM Type") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Share of 136 papers",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 24),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.title   = element_text (size = 24)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 80, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave(plot_llms, file = "plot_llms.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_llms

```
## Appendix: LLMs by phase

```{r}
# Calculate number of unique papers per stage
stage_counts <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("stage_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("stage_"),
    names_to = "stage",
    values_to = "stage_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(stage_value == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    stage = recode(stage,
                   "stage_pre"  = "Pre-data collection",
                   "stage_data" = "Data collection",
                   "stage_post" = "Post-data collection"),
    stage = factor(stage, levels = c("Pre-data collection", "Data collection", "Post-data collection"))
  ) %>%
  count(stage, name = "n_stage")


# Pivot longer and clean LLM data
llm_long <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("llm_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("llm_"),
    names_to = "llm",
    values_to = "llm_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    llm_value == 1,
    !llm %in% c("llm_multiple", "llm_bert")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    llm = case_when(
      llm == "llm_bard"   ~ "llm_gemini",
      llm == "llm_alpaca" ~ "llm_llama",
      TRUE ~ llm
    ),
    llm = if_else(
      llm %in% c(
        "llm_gpt",
        "llm_claude",
        "llm_llama",
        "llm_gemini",
        "llm_mistral",
        "llm_deepseek"
      ),
      llm,
      "llm_other"
    ),
    llm = llm %>%
      str_remove("^llm_") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    llm = case_when(
      llm == "Gpt" ~ "GPT",
      llm == "Deepseek" ~ "DeepSeek",
      TRUE ~ llm
    ),
    llm_type = if_else(
      llm %in% c("GPT", "Claude", "Gemini"),
      "Proprietary",
      "Open-source"
    )
  )


# Pivot longer stages
stage_long <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("stage_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("stage_"),
    names_to = "stage",
    values_to = "stage_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(stage_value == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    stage = recode(stage,
                   "stage_pre"  = "Pre-data collection",
                   "stage_data" = "Data collection",
                   "stage_post" = "Post-data collection"),
    stage = factor(stage, levels = c("Pre-data collection", "Data collection", "Post-data collection"))
  )

# Join and calculate stage-specific percentages
data_plot_llms_stage <- llm_long %>%
  inner_join(stage_long, by = "id") %>%
  count(stage, llm, llm_type, name = "n") %>%
  left_join(stage_counts, by = "stage") %>%
  mutate(
    share = n / n_stage * 100,
    stage_label = paste0(stage, " (n = ", n_stage, ")"),
    stage_label = factor(stage_label, levels = c("Pre-data collection (n = 23)", "Data collection (n = 54)", "Post-data collection (n = 73)")), # hard-code!
    llm = factor(
      llm,
      levels = c("Other", "DeepSeek", "Mistral",
                 "Gemini", "Claude", "Llama", "GPT")
    )
  )

# Plot
plot_llms_stage <- ggplot(
  data_plot_llms_stage,
  aes(x = share, y = llm, fill = llm_type)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(share, 1), "%")),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ stage_label) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "LLM Type") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Share of papers within phase",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 18),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 18)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 80, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave(plot_llms_stage, file = "plot_llms_stage.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_llms_stage
```

## Number of papers with multiple LLMs & which

```{r}
100*prop.table(table(data$llm_multiple))
100*prop.table(table(data$llm_gpt, data$llm_multiple), 1)


data_llm_combos <- data %>%
  # Keep only papers flagged as using multiple LLMs
  filter(llm_multiple == 1) %>%
  
  select(id, starts_with("llm_")) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("llm_"),
    names_to = "llm",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  
  # Keep actually used LLMs
  filter(
    value == 1,
    !llm %in% c("llm_multiple")
  ) %>%
  
  # Collapse derivatives
  mutate(
    llm = case_when(
      llm == "llm_bard"   ~ "llm_gemini",
      llm == "llm_alpaca" ~ "llm_llama",
      TRUE ~ llm
    ),
    
    # Keep core models, collapse rest into Other
    llm = if_else(
      llm %in% c(
        "llm_gpt",
        "llm_claude",
        "llm_llama",
        "llm_gemini",
        "llm_mistral",
        "llm_deepseek",
        "llm_bert"
      ),
      llm,
      "llm_other"
    ),
    
    # Clean labels
    llm = llm %>%
      str_remove("^llm_") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    
    llm = case_when(
      llm == "Gpt" ~ "GPT",
      llm == "Deepseek" ~ "DeepSeek",
      llm == "Bert" ~ "BERT",
      TRUE ~ llm
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # Create combination per paper
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
    combo = paste(sort(unique(llm)), collapse = " + "),
    n_models = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 7 papers comparing only within the same family

data_plot_llms_multiple <- data_llm_combos %>%
  count(combo, sort = TRUE)

plot_llms_multiple <- ggplot(data_plot_llms_multiple,
       aes(x = n,
           y = reorder(combo, n))) +
    geom_col(fill = viridis(1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            hjust = -0.2,
            size = 5) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .15))) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of papers using multiple LLMs",
    y = "LLM families used"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16)
  )

ggsave(plot_llms_multiple, file = "plot_llms_multiple.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_llms_multiple
```


# Prompting approaches

```{r}
prompt_props <- prop_count(data, cols = grep("^prompt_", names(data), value = TRUE))

prompt_props
```

## Appendix: Prompting approaches by phase

```{r}
# Reshape prompting data
prompt_long <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("prompt_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("prompt_"),
    names_to = "prompt",
    values_to = "prompt_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(prompt_value == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    prompt = recode(prompt,
                    "prompt_zero"     = "Zero-shot",
                    "prompt_few"      = "One-/Few-shot",
                    "prompt_finetune" = "Fine-tuning"),
    prompt = factor(prompt, levels = c("Fine-tuning", "One-/Few-shot", "Zero-shot"))
  )

# Join with stage info
prompt_stage <- stage_long %>%
  select(id, stage) %>%
  distinct()   # ensure one row per id-stage

data_plot_prompt_stage <- prompt_long %>%
  inner_join(stage_long, by = "id") %>%
  group_by(stage, prompt) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n_distinct(id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(stage_counts, by = "stage") %>%
  mutate(
    share = n / n_stage * 100,
    stage_label = factor(
      paste0(stage, " (n = ", n_stage, ")"),
      levels = paste0(levels(stage_counts$stage), " (n = ", stage_counts$n_stage, ")")
    )
  )

# Plot
plot_prompt_stage <- ggplot(
  data_plot_prompt_stage,
  aes(x = share, y = prompt)
) +
  geom_col(fill = viridis(1)
           ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(share, 1), "%")),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ stage_label) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Share of papers within phase",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 18),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 18)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 80, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave(plot_prompt_stage, file = "plot_prompt_stage.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_prompt_stage
```


# Figure 4: Languages used

```{r}
# Map labels
lang_labels <- c(
  "lang_en" = "English",
  "lang_de" = "German",
  "lang_cn" = "Chinese",
  "lang_es" = "Spanish",
  "lang_fr" = "French",
  "lang_kr" = "Korean",
  "lang_ar" = "Arabic",
  "lang_it" = "Italian",
  "lang_pt" = "Portuguese",
  "lang_se" = "Swedish",
  "lang_nl" = "Dutch",
  "lang_sk" = "Slovak",
  "lang_hi" = "Hindu",
  "lang_jp" = "Japanese",
  "lang_other" = "Other"
)

# Calculate shares
data_plot_lang <- data %>%
  select(id, starts_with("lang_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("lang_"),
    names_to = "lang",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(value == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    language = recode(lang, !!!lang_labels),
    language = if_else(language %in% c("Hindu", "Italian"), "Other", language)
  ) %>%
  count(language, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    share = n / nrow(data) * 100,
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(share)) %>%
  mutate(language = factor(language, levels = c("Other", "Swedish", "Slovak", "Portuguese", "Korean", "Dutch", "Japanese", "Arabic", "French", "Spanish", "Chinese", "German", "English")))  # descending order with "Other" last


# Plot
plot_lang <- ggplot(data_plot_lang, aes(x = share, y = language)) +
  geom_col(fill = viridis(1)
           ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(share, 1), "%")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 7.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Share of 136 papers",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 24)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 80, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave(plot_lang, file = "plot_lang.png", height = 8, width = 18)

plot_lang
```

# Appendix: Populations

```{r}
pop_props <- prop_count(data, cols = grep("^pop_", names(data), value = TRUE))

pop_props
```

# Appendix: Domains

```{r}
domain_props <- prop_count(data, cols = grep("^domain_", names(data), value = TRUE))

domain_props
```
